message:
fix(storage): replace silent unwrap_or_default with explicit JSON parse error propagation

Replace unwrap_or_default() calls in load_run_details for warnings_json
and replay_json with a new parse_required_json_field helper that returns
a Storage error on malformed JSON. Add parse_optional_acceleration_json
to handle empty/null acceleration payloads explicitly. Update tests to
assert error propagation instead of silent defaults, ensuring corrupted
run data is detected rather than silently masked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
